product.name: Greendale Home Fashions Outdoor 2-Piece Sunbrella Premium Deep Seat Cushion Set, Canvas Navy
product.description: Enhance the look and feel of your patio furniture with this Greendale Home Fashions Deep Seat Cushion Set covered with high-performance Sunbrella fabric.   The premium dacron-wrapped foam seat cushion retains its firm shape, and comes with a zipper closure.  The plush back pillow is overstuffed with a soft polyfiber fill made from 100% recycled, post-consumer plastic bottles, and features a sewn closure.  Cushions are covered with a UV resistant, 100% acrylic outdoor fabric that resists water, fading, and stains. Both cushions are reversible and feature a decorative trim cording.  This set is the perfect replacement for many wrought iron and rattan original chair sets. A variety of colors are available to enhance your outdoor decor. Cushions are filled and finished in the USA.Please Note: Cushion dimensions can be +/- 2 inches. Product will arrive in a slightly compressed state; please allow a few days for product to expand to final size listed in description.In an effort to reduce waste, your cushions will arrive in a recyclable box with no additional plastic waste.For best results, and to extend the life of your cushions we recommend storing them covered when not in use.
features: 2-PIECE SET: This premium deep seat cushion set comes with one 24" W x 24" D reversible seat cushion, and one 24" W x 20" H reversible back cushion (Furniture pictured is not included)
DURABLE SUNBRELLA FABRIC: Cushion is covered in a heavy-duty outdoor acrylic Sunbrella fabric that is water, stain, and fade resistant

FIRM SEAT SUPPORT: Premium seat cushions feature a dacron-wrapped foam insert for premium comfort and support. Back cushions are generously filled in the USA with a soft polyfiber made from 100% recycled, post-consumer plastic bottles
Ideal replacement cushions for deep seat lounge chairs and sectional sofas

Universal fit works well with a variety of outdoor furniture. Please be sure to measure your furniture before purchasing this cushion to ensure a proper fit. A dimensional diagram is provided in the image section for your convenience.
